1.title:
Shop. Save.
Repeat.
1.sub: The smart way to pay — earn cashback on every purchase, paid by instant bank transfer.

2.title: Buy gift cards, get cash back.
2.sub: When you shop at stores you already love, buy a Loop gift card first. You get up to 7% back instantly.

3.title: 500+ brands you’ll actually use.
3.sub: Groceries, gas, dining, everyday runs. Your cashback adds up fast.

4.title: What’s your email?
4.sub: We’ll send you a 6-digit code to verify. Your email is never shared.

6.title: Pick your currency.
6.sub: Prices, purchases and cashback all land in this currency. You can change it later with our support team.

7.title: One-tap sign in
7.sub: Use biometrics to lock Loop on app launch. If biometrics are unavailable later, Loop can fall back to your device passcode. Your biometric data never leaves the device.

8.title:
Your cashback,
your wallet.
8.sub: Cashback lands in your Loop balance instantly. Move it to your own Stellar wallet any time — Loop mints a branded stablecoin for your currency.

9.title: You’re in.
9.sub: Your Loop account is ready. Start earning on your first purchase.

1.sub: The smart way to shop — save up to 15% instantly on gift cards from stores you already use.

trust.step2: Buy a gift card at the store
